ocr_findings.description: Image shows a 学習のポイント badge icon next to ハッシュ関数とダイジェスト box; OCR omits the badge icon label but captures all box text — cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Page shows the digital signature flow diagram (steps 1-6) and the ハッシュ関数とダイジェスト explanation box. Both diagram caption labels and all six numbered steps are faithfully captured. The diagram itself is replaced by an image placeholder as expected.
